planTitle: Add HTTPS config model and YAML loader
summary: Created internal/config/https.go with HTTPSConfig model, IsValid validation, and YAML load/save helpers. Added internal/config/https_test.go covering disabled/enabled validation, missing-file defaults, and round-trip persistence. Verified with go test ./internal/config -run HTTPS -v (7/7 PASS) and go vet ./internal/config.
